brands.widthDisclaimer: CHAYA sizing follows a more average quad-skate profile. Use the millimeter recommendation as the baseline and review product notes for model-specific comfort guidance.

brands.name: FR Skates
brands.widthDisclaimer: FR shells generally feel roomy and supportive. If you are between sizes use the recommended millimeter match first and consider a performance fit only after checking the product page notes.
